description: Pump-focused fast-turn Birdeye meme-list recipes for a small-bankroll graduation play. These prioritize active tape, quick post-grad continuation, and names that can move enough to matter on 10 to 20 USD tickets.

recipes.name: grad_15m_trade5m
recipes.description: Fresh graduates ranked by active 5m tape. Best for immediate churn after crossing the line.

recipes.name: grad_30m_volume5m
recipes.description: Recent graduates ranked by immediate 5m dollar flow.

recipes.name: grad_45m_live_tape
recipes.description: Graduates that are still printing a live tape, even if they are not the largest names yet.

recipes.name: grad_60m_trade5m
recipes.description: One-hour graduate scan ranked by 5m tape count for fast-turn continuation setups.

recipes.name: grad_90m_volume1h_holder
recipes.description: Wider fast-turn graduate scan with some holder breadth and stronger 1h flow.

recipes.name: grad_4h_holder_liquidity
recipes.description: Higher-quality post-grad names with enough holder spread and exitability for small-ticket trades.

recipes.name: pregrad_92_trade5m_scout
recipes.description: Research-only near-grad scout ranked by tape count. Useful to measure whether pregrad is worth the risk in this window.

recipes.name: pregrad_95_volume5m_scout
recipes.description: Research-only near-finish scout ranked by immediate dollar flow.
